title: Polish settings copy
problem: The settings page contains unclear operator-facing copy, and the bounded cosmetic update should leave behavior unchanged while making the text easier to scan.
context: The change is limited to the settings surface in the current Protostar repository checkout.

acceptanceCriteria.statement: The settings page copy uses the approved operator-facing wording without changing behavior.
The focused intent admission tests pass with deterministic ordering and stable normalized AC ids.

constraints: Do not touch execution, review repair, delivery, or Dogpile planning internals.
stopConditions: Stop after one bounded cosmetic admission repair loop is consumed.

toolPermissions.reason: Run the focused deterministic admission tests.
